approaches.title: Center expansion
approaches.summary: Expands around every possible odd and even palindrome center, tracking the longest substring found.

revisions.commitBody: too tired to know wtf is gg on
revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial center-expansion implementation using a helper function for odd and even centers.
Refactored the helper into a closure, combined short-input handling, and reorganized odd/even center checks.
Simplified the closure and byte-slice handling while retaining center expansion over all indices.
